name: Capture Chat Context
description: When the agent stops, capture any important decisions, discoveries, or notes from the session into the project context log.

then.prompt:
Review the conversation that just completed. If any of the following occurred, append a dated entry to 'c:\Users\manni\OneDrive\Homebrew_dev\context-log.md' (create it if it doesn't exist):
- A technical decision was made (e.g. choosing a tool, architecture, approach)
- A problem was discovered or solved
- A new idea or feature was discussed
- A configuration detail was established (IP, port, credential name, service URL)
- A next step or TODO was identified

Format the entry as:
## [YYYY-MM-DD] Session Notes
- [Decision/Discovery/TODO]: description

If nothing significant happened (e.g. it was just a simple question), skip the file write. Do not duplicate entries that already exist in the log.
